note: Popular Telugu, Hindi, Tamil theatrical releases — last 7 days and next 7 days. Updated weekly by pipeline.

now_playing.title: Hari Hara Veera Mallu
now_playing.cast: Pawan Kalyan, Nidhhi Agerwal, Bobby Deol
now_playing.desc: The long-awaited period epic starring Pawan Kalyan as a daring thief in 17th-century India. Lavish sets, mass action — a big-screen treat for fans.

now_playing.title: Kubera
now_playing.cast: Dhanush, Nagarjuna, Jim Sarbh, Rashmika Mandanna
now_playing.desc: Sekhar Kammula's pan-India crime epic — Dhanush plays a man seduced by the underworld. Nagarjuna is electrifying as the antagonist. Strong reviews.

now_playing.title: Jaat
now_playing.cast: Sunny Deol, Randeep Hooda, Regina Cassandra
now_playing.desc: Sunny Deol's high-octane action film directed by Gopichand Malineni — the director behind Beast. Mass entertainer aimed at single-screen audiences.

coming_soon.title: Coolie
coming_soon.desc: The most-anticipated Tamil film of 2026 — Rajinikanth + Lokesh Kanagaraj, the team that wanted to make Thalapathy but didn't. Early buzz is through the roof.

coming_soon.title: RC16
coming_soon.cast: Ram Charan, Janhvi Kapoor, S. J. Suryah
coming_soon.desc: Ram Charan plays a kabaddi player in this mass sports drama from the director of Uppena. Janhvi Kapoor's biggest Telugu film to date. Pan-India release.

coming_soon.title: Maatrubhumi
coming_soon.cast: Salman Khan, Chitrangada Singh, Sooraj Pancholi
coming_soon.desc: Salman Khan's tribute to the Galwan Valley soldiers — a patriotic war epic releasing just ahead of the fiscal year end. One of 2026's most-watched releases.

coming_soon.title: Retro
coming_soon.desc: Suriya and Karthik Subbaraj's much-hyped collaboration. Promises to blend stylized action with an intense emotional core — among the most-tracked Tamil films of 2026.
